# Content Attribution

The bundled reference data (`lt_reference.json`) contains exact quotes
from the Lucid Principles Canon, written by Chords of Truth (2011-2017).

- **Creator:** Chords of Truth
- **Project:** Lucid Principles — https://lucidprinciples.com
- **License:** Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0)

Canon quotes must never be paraphrased, rearranged, or altered when
redistributed. Quote exactly or do not quote.

All code in this package is licensed Apache 2.0 (see LICENSE).
